name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: New ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, at noon (EST) today, Gov. John Kasich will unveil his national security plan to make America safer and defeat ISIS.

**You can tune in to watch live online at C-SPAN.org**.

[We also started running a new ad online today](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31686197:W80qxAyN_:m:1:958431888:D9E7543B18820B4380153FC77A755672:r) in several of the early primary states to highlight John Kasich's eighteen years of experience on the U.S. House Defense Committee and that he's long been calling for President Obama to start leading in the fight against ISIS.

**[You can watch the ad here and chip in $5, $25, $50 or more right now to help us keep it running!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31686197:W80qxAyN_:m:1:958431888:D9E7543B18820B4380153FC77A755672:r)**

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31686197:W80qxAyN_:m:1:958431888:D9E7543B18820B4380153FC77A755672:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31686197:W80qxAyN_:m:1:958431888:D9E7543B18820B4380153FC77A755672:r)

**Peter -**[**with your help, we can win**](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31686197:W80qxAyN_:m:1:958431888:D9E7543B18820B4380153FC77A755672:r).

Thanks.

**John Weaver**
Chief Strategist
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31686197:W80qxAyN_:m:1:958431888:D9E7543B18820B4380153FC77A755672:r)

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Fwd: This Wednesday join Byron York and Senator Ted Cruz for a telephone town hall
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

I wanted to make sure
you saw this invitation to join me for a live teletownhall this
Wednesday, November 18th, at 6 pm ET where I'll discuss the
conservative principles guiding my bold, positive agenda for
reigniting the promise of America. I hope you'll be able to join
us - click here to RSVP now.

Begin forwarded
message:

From: "Washington
Examiner"
Date: November 15,
2015 at 6:31:37 AM CST
To: Ted Cruz
Subject: This
Wednesday join Byron York and Senator Ted Cruz for a telephone
town hall

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

subject: Card Not Activated
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Friend -- you have not yet activated your CRUZ CREW exclusive member card. |
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31687665:sgc_4AycN:m:1:1104269936:B21506CE2ED47200F71B2E65EAD9B538:r) |
---|---|---
---
| **Friend -- you have not yet activated your CRUZ CREW exclusive member card.**

As one of my most dedicated conservative supporters, I want to get you your first edition CRUZ CREW membership card today.

**[Click here to chip in and activate your membership today >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31687665:sgc_4AycN:m:1:1104269936:B21506CE2ED47200F71B2E65EAD9B538:r)**

It will look like this:

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31687666:sgc_4AycN:m:1:1104269936:B21506CE2ED47200F71B2E65EAD9B538:r)

EXCEPT -- **if you activate your card in the next 48 hours** \-- I'll make sure your card reflects that you got in on the ground floor by designating you as a 2015 first edition member of the CRUZ CREW.

I'll only have first edition cards available for the next 48 hours.

**[Follow this link to activate your CRUZ CREW Membership with a contribution of $35 or more, and I'll send you your first edition personalized membership card immediately.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31687665:sgc_4AycN:m:1:1104269936:B21506CE2ED47200F71B2E65EAD9B538:r)**

As a first edition member, you will secure your spot on an exclusive call with senior Cruz for President staff -- talking strategy and laying out the groundwork being done across the country to lock up the nomination.

Friend, I hope you will keep this card in your wallet and carry it with pride as your token of support for my campaign.

I'm focused on fighting and winning -- **[uniting the GOP to defeat Hillary.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31687665:sgc_4AycN:m:1:1104269936:B21506CE2ED47200F71B2E65EAD9B538:r)**

You see, under President Obama's watch:

| 1. | Our enemies have grown stronger and become emboldened -- putting us at great risk both at home and abroad;

---|---
2. | The federal government continues to expand even while the economy grinds to a halt; and

3. | We have lost our liberty to crippling regulations like Obamacare.

You and I must band together to fight the Washington Cartel and Obama's unprecedented expansion of the federal government bureaucracy.

**[Click here to chip in and activate your membership today >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31687665:sgc_4AycN:m:1:1104269936:B21506CE2ED47200F71B2E65EAD9B538:r)**

Thank you and God bless!

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

[** GET YOUR CARD **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31687665:sgc_4AycN:m:1:1104269936:B21506CE2ED47200F71B2E65EAD9B538:r)

name: strikeforce@tedcruz.org
subject: Join Ted Cruz’s Iowa Strike Force Today
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Did you see this?

Dear Friend,

Our Iowa Strike Force
is growing by the day! Courageous conservatives from across the
country are signing up to deploy to Iowa in the months of
December and January, all leading up to the critical Iowa
Caucuses on Monday, February 1st. Click here to join our Iowa
Strike Force today! Strike Force Signup

The Iowa caucus is a
unique process that is dramatically impacted by direct voter
contact. Because a caucus does not provide for early or absentee
voting, it is a true test of a ground game: the ability of
campaigns to identify, win over, and deliver voters. Your
involvement will make a tangible difference in the outcome in
Iowa. You will be on the ground floor of this operation to
identify, win over and deliver voters for Ted!
Important: our
campaign has secured free lodging near our Des Moines, Iowa HQ
for volunteers who can make the trek to Iowa. Sign up for our
Iowa Strike Force today to secure free lodging for you, your
family, and friends willing to volunteer! Strike Force Signup

For Liberty,
Cruz Strike Force
Ted Cruz for
President

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

www.tedcruz.org

Copyright © 2015 All Rights
Reserved | Privacy Policy

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system October 8, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWTS811yNp

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWTS811yNp

name: Christina Egea
subject: My friends and family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|
---
| |
---|---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44946345:J-s3ycLN6:m:1:1516426255:4D31428AF6022AE85C596F862F50CD7E:r) |
| | | Peter, What a difference between Governor Christie's performance in last Tuesday's Republican debate and Hillary Clinton's in Saturday's Democratic debate. Governor Christie's debate performance last week was widely considered to be the best. He made strong, bold statements on the most important issues facing this country and remained focused on the goal: ensuring that a Hillary Clinton presidency remains a liberal fantasy.
The Governor sums up the reason we need to be focused on Hillary with this important message:
> _If you listen to Hillary Clinton, she's made it very clear: She believes that she can make decisions for you better than you can make them for yourself._
This is exactly why we are working to make Governor Christie the President of the United States. He will take on Hillary Clinton with his clear vision and bold leadership. That's why today, **_I'm making a donation to my boss._** He is the most tested, mature candidate in this race. And make no mistake, he is the ONLY person who can beat Hillary next fall. In addition to making a donation myself, I'm going to ask my family and friends to do so. **[That is why I'm asking you, can you make a donation to help Governor Christie? $5, $10, $25, or more would go a long way towards making sure he can make his visions for our country a reality](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44946345:J-s3ycLN6:m:1:1516426255:4D31428AF6022AE85C596F862F50CD7E:r). ** Thank you for your time,
Christina
Chris Christie 2016 [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44946345:J-s3ycLN6:m:1:1516426255:4D31428AF6022AE85C596F862F50CD7E:r)
---

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: A virtual tie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

There are moments in races that decide elections. They shift momentum in favor of one candidate or another. I believe we are at one of those moments right now.

Florida will likely decide if Democrats can take back the the Senate, and everyone is taking notice -- the national media, the Koch Brothers, pollsters.

_Bloomberg Business_ said, **" The War for the Senate will be decided in Florida."** Now, a recent poll has me just one point behind Republican David Jolly.

[**This is a chance for us to gain momentum and take Florida and the Senate for Democrats. Anything you can contribute makes a difference.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2127/738133e4/3a31ac9c/7f834d5c/1270714440/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151117?refcode=pme151117_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

I love living in the Sunshine State. I grew up fishing on our coastlines, swimming at our beaches, and working with my dad on construction sites when I was a teenager. After college, I started a business here.

I've been fortunate, but not every hard-working Floridian out there has had the opportunity to be.

That's why I'm fighting to make sure Democrats take back the Senate. We need to make progress on raising the minimum wage, protecting our environment, expanding Medicare and working to close the wealth gap -- and you know these aren't GOP priorities.

One of the most important lessons I learned from working on construction sites as a teen was the importance of a strong foundation.

[**We are building the foundation right now. But instead of building a house, we 're going to take one back. Help us do it by chipping in what you can.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2127/738133e4/3a31ac9c/7f834d5c/1270714440/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151117?refcode=pme151117_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you,

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2127/738133e4/3a31ac9c/7f834d5d/1270714440/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2127/738133e4/3a31ac9c/7f834d5e/1270714440/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved

name: John Kasich
subject: Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, earlier today I announced a National Security Plan that will make America safer and lead a coalition of nations to defeat ISIS.

**America has been sitting on the sidelines for far too long and the world is more dangerous without our leadership**.

[Please take a few minutes to watch my speech and to learn more about my proposals](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31703345:sryZw1yPN:m:1:958431888:7A285F77A0DDFA73F530025B8A22DD71:r).

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31703345:sryZw1yPN:m:1:958431888:7A285F77A0DDFA73F530025B8A22DD71:r)
**The world needs American leadership!**
**Learn more:** [JohnKasich.com/NationalSecurity](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31703345:sryZw1yPN:m:1:958431888:7A285F77A0DDFA73F530025B8A22DD71:r)

Will you please forward this email to five or more friends/family and [encourage them to sign our petition](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31703345:sryZw1yPN:m:1:958431888:7A285F77A0DDFA73F530025B8A22DD71:r) if they agree so we can keep them updated?

Thanks for all that you're doing to help.

**John Kasich**
Governor of Ohio & Presidential Candidate
[JohnKasich.com
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31703345:sryZw1yPN:m:1:958431888:7A285F77A0DDFA73F530025B8A22DD71:r)

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

name: Bill Clinton
subject: I think we should meet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Meet me on the trail for dinner. | Friend --
There's nothing like ending a long day with a nice meal and good conversation.

**[I'd love to sit down with you and hear your story -- and the campaign would like to treat.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=31&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We can cover a lot of ground over dinner: Where you think the country should be going, what you're excited or worried about, and just as importantly, what you’re reading. We can talk about politics if you want, or you can let me brag a little about my amazing granddaughter (and you can tell me about your family, too!).

One of the things I enjoy most is meeting new people, so I'm really looking forward to it.

**All you have to do to be there is enter, so add your name now:**

[ | | [**RSVP for dinner**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Bill

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 11/06/15 and 11/30/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=36&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without donating. One (1) winner will receive a special invitation for winner and a guest to attend an official campaign event where they will meet Bill Clinton, round-trip airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the campaign event, and one (1) night hotel accommodation for winner and winner’s guest (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1040). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=34&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=29&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=35&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjQwMTQzMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjgxNjg4NDk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Rubio/Schumer teamed up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,
The strategy of Marco Rubio, Hillary Clinton,
and Chuck Schumer and the Gang of 8 to support liberal
immigration policies would make our country dramatically less
safe. They seem to want to put American troops on the ground in
the Middle East, but are unwilling to secure our borders here at
home.
Rubio's liberal immigration policies are bad
for conservatives, bad for our country, and most importantly, bad
for our nation's security.
That is why Rand fought for an amendment that
would've allowed Congress to have more oversight on immigration
and further scrutinize those allowed in the country to keep
America safer. Marco Rubio blocked this amendment, and other
conservative amendments because of a backroom deal with liberal
Senator Chuck Schumer.

Marco Rubio with Chuck Schumer and John
McCain
This critical issue is now becoming even more
important because of the Paris attacks and the Syrian refugee
crisis. Rubio's liberal immigration policy puts our country even
more at risk.
And it gets even worse. Rubio even wanted
these refugees to come into our country without Rand's
immigration security amendment.
Here is what National Review said:
In September, Rubio told a South Carolina
town hall audience, "We would be potentially open to the
relocation of some of these individuals at some point in time to
the United States." But the prospect that terrorists could use
the refugee crisis to smuggle themselves into the United States
was obvious in September, as was the fact that there is no system
of vetting available to us that could mitigate that risk.
Rubio has expressed support for allowing the
refugees into our country, opposed Rand's amendment to strengthen
the security measures in immigration policy, and cut a backroom
deal with Chuck Schumer to oppose conservatives. This should
forever preclude conservatives from supporting Marco Rubio.
We can trust Rand to stand strong for
conservative principles, and make decisions that will make our
country safer here at home.
Please join thousands of concerned Americans
in standing with Rand on his opposition of allowing Syrian
refugees into this nation.
In Liberty,
Doug Stafford

Give $10 Today >>

Give $25 Today >>

Give $50 Today >>

Give $100 Today >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Friend, let's meet
body:
Friend,

I know you get a lot of emails from us, but I think you're going to like this one.

Today we're officially announcing the Dinner with Jeb contest, where I'll fly one lucky winner to have dinner with me.

[**All you have to do to enter is chip in $1 or more right now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/qdsqyvdrhfgtncnmtvbqhtjcddtjrcyrqvpvgrcwhpmn_ksdvvfpt.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cmdrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsdqjtt_ksdvvfpt.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Friend, one of my favorite parts about this journey is meeting and hearing the stories of supporters across the country. I hope I get to do the same with you over dinner.

**Oh, and I almost forgot, everything is on us. The hotel, the food, it 's all covered.**

So enter now for your chance to win: [**Jeb2016.com/Dinner-with-Jeb-Donate/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/eqrljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcspzrs_ksdvvfpt.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Good luck,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/qdnqyvdrhfgtncnmtvbqhtjcddtjrcyrqvpvgrcwhpms_ksdvvfpt.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=5676&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://jeb2016.com/dinner-with-jeb-sweepstakes-rules/). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://jeb2016.com/dinner-with-jeb/). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/dinner-with-jeb-donate/). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/dinner-with-jeb/). Entries are limited to 50 per person. Void in Florida and where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Tuesday, November 17, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Standard Time and ends on Thursday, December 31, 2015 at 11:59 pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 pm Eastern Standard Time on Thursday, December 31, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets in the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; dinner with Jeb Bush at one of the area restaurants, with an approximate retail value of $100; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $1,825. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules](https://jeb2016.com/dinner-with-jeb-sweepstakes-rules/). The Sponsor is Jeb 2016, Inc. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144.

name: Jordyn Rush
subject: RED ALERT: Koch brothers
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
We knew this was coming, Friend.

Groups tied to the Koch brothers spent big here in Pennsylvania's recent election.

Why? Charles Koch said it best when asked about all of their spending: **" I expect something in return."**

The Kochs have already spent **over $1.5 million THIS YEAR ALONE** to prop up Pat Toomey, and Toomey has shown he'll repay the Kochs by consistently voting in favor of special interests and against Pennsylvania families.

**We can 't allow the Koch brothers and their network of billionaire donors to push Pat Toomey to victory.**

[**We need your help to fight back against the influx of false attacks funded by dark money and special interest groups. Chip in $5 today so we can defend Katie and send her to the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4757396700954361856/8687746046895325184?refcode=e20151117nd&amount=5)

| **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4757396700954361856/8687746046895325184?refcode=e20151117nd&amount=5)**
---

The GOP knows Toomey is barely hanging onto his Senate seat. After five years of failed leadership in Washington, Pennsylvanians in every corner of the Commonwealth are sick of Toomey's inaction in the Senate.

That's exactly why the GOP is sounding the alarm and calling for help from out-of-state billionaires who are willing to spend whatever it takes to preserve the status quo.

Pennsylvania deserves a senator who fights for families, not for billionaires.

[**Chip in $5 today to show everyone watching this race that Katie doesn 't need billionaire donors when she has grassroots supporters by her side.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4757396700954361856/8687746046895325184?refcode=e20151117nd&amount=5)

Thanks for helping out,

Jordyn Rush
Deputy Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4757396700954361856/8687746046895325184?refcode=e20151117nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4757396700954361856/8615688452857397248).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States
